transcript.speaker: carly
transcript.text: Hi Maya, this is Carly from Cook in Fiesta. You already booked with us, and I am just calling to understand what made you choose the experience.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Sure. We are visiting Barcelona with my parents and wanted something more memorable than another restaurant dinner.

transcript.speaker: carly
transcript.text: What mattered most when you were deciding?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: It felt hands-on and local. My husband liked that it was not just watching someone cook. We also liked that it seemed relaxed enough for my parents.

transcript.speaker: carly
transcript.text: Did you consider anything else before booking?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, a tapas tour, a normal restaurant dinner, and another cooking class. The other class looked cheaper, but it felt more crowded.

transcript.speaker: carly
transcript.text: Was there anything that made you hesitate?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: The price was a little higher than we expected, so we talked about it. But since it is a special trip with my parents, we decided it was worth it.

transcript.speaker: carly
transcript.text: Was there anything unclear before booking?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I was not totally sure about the walking or stairs. My dad can walk, but too many stairs are hard for him. If someone could message me about that, it would help.

transcript.speaker: carly
transcript.text: I will note that you would like someone to follow up about mobility details.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Thanks. Otherwise we are excited. It looks like a nice way to do something together.
